name: ASRock B850M PRO-A WIFI Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x4 - Support DDR5-8000+(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-C+A - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Dragon 2.5G LAN - 802.11axe Wi-Fi 6E - Bluetooth 5.2
shortName: ASRock B850M PRO-A WIFI Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe
description: ASRock B850M PRO-A WIFI Micro-ATX motherboard with AM5 socket, PCIe 5.0, and Wi-Fi 6E for compact professional AMD systems.
